member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether new media notifications are enabled.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether episode notifications should be grouped. When enabled, multiple episodes added at once show as "Episodes 4-8" instead of individual notifications.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the language switch (EN/LT) is shown.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the notification toggle is shown in the header.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether notifications are enabled by default for users. When true, notifications are on by default (users can toggle off with bell icon). When false, notifications are off by default (users can toggle on with bell icon).

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Latest Media button is shown in the header. Replaces the Sync Play button with a dropdown showing 50 most recently added media items.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Ratings.JavaScriptInjectionService
member.summary: Background service that injects the ratings JavaScript into Jellyfin's web client on startup. This is a FALLBACK method - the primary injection is done via HTTP middleware. File injection works on systems where Jellyfin has write access to jellyfin-web folder.
